name: Essential Tee
shortDescription: The everyday hero. Mid-weight cotton, clean drape, zero fuss.
description: Our Essential Tee is the staple your wardrobe keeps reaching for. Cut from breathable mid-weight cotton with a tailored-but-relaxed fit, it carries you from coffee runs to calls without missing a beat. Pre-shrunk, colour-locked, and built to keep its shape wash after wash.

name: Premium Polo
shortDescription: Casual yet formal. The collar that means business.
description: The Premium Polo bridges casual and formal effortlessly. A structured ribbed collar, mother-of-pearl-style buttons and a refined piqué knit give it a quietly elevated finish. Dress it up under a blazer or keep it easy with denim — either way you look like you mean business.

name: Heavyweight Tee
description: For those who like their tees with presence. The Heavyweight Tee is a 240 GSM boxy cut with structured shoulders and a premium hand-feel that drapes beautifully. It is the kind of basic that quietly signals you don't compromise.

name: Classic Crew
shortDescription: Timeless crew neck. Soft, durable, endlessly wearable.
description: The Classic Crew is exactly what it promises — a perfectly proportioned crew neck in soft, durable cotton. Reinforced neckline, clean side seams and a fit that flatters without trying too hard. The reliable backbone of any rotation.

name: Signature Polo
shortDescription: Our most refined collar. Subtle tonal branding.
description: The Signature Polo is our most considered collar yet — a slightly heavier piqué, tonal stitched detailing and a clean placket. It reads boardroom or brunch with equal confidence.

name: Everyday Pocket Tee
shortDescription: A clean chest pocket on our signature soft cotton.
description: Same beloved Essential cotton, now with a neatly proportioned chest pocket for a touch of utility. A small detail that makes a simple tee feel intentional.
